title: Compact GPS Callouts
notes: GPS callout boxes now display only the manually entered latitude and longitude.
Hole labels such as GPS B17 and the Manual coordinate tag line have been removed from callouts.
Each callout box automatically sizes itself tightly around the two coordinate lines.
An expanded invisible drag target keeps the smaller callouts practical to move on a touchscreen.
The m38.19 blank-GPS cleanup and m38.18 Quick Fill targeting fix remain included.
